feed.title: Abhijit More
feed.subtitle: Production ML engineer building agentic AI, RAG, low-latency inference, and search/ranking systems.

entry.title: RelevanceIQ: Grounded Product Search over 568K Reviews

link.title: RelevanceIQ: Grounded Product Search over 568K Reviews

entry.summary: RelevanceIQ: Grounded Product Search Most RAG demos are a vector store and a prompt. RelevanceIQ is a production-grade hybrid retrieval and citation-grounded RAG system over the Amazon Fine Food Reviews corpus (568K reviews / 74K products), where every design choice is measured, benchmarked, and served through a live FastAPI stack. BM25 · dense retrieval · cross-encoder reranking · query r...

entry.title: KAIROS: Decision Intelligence System for Risk & Demographic Analytics

link.title: KAIROS: Decision Intelligence System for Risk & Demographic Analytics

entry.summary: KAIROS: Decision Intelligence System Standard gradient-boosted models output scores, not decisions. KAIROS is a production-grade risk intelligence engine that turns hybrid ensembles into a mission-critical decision system with statistical calibration, precision gates, and full observability for banking risk and demographic analytics. LightGBM · CatBoost · Isotonic calibration · precision g...

entry.title: DeepSeek-V3.2: A Technical Deep Dive
entry.summary: Originally published on Brewing Intelligence (Jan 8, 2026). I spent the last week diving into DeepSeek’s latest paper, and I’ll be honest, I wasn’t expecting much. We’ve seen this pattern before: open-source model releases with big claims, only to find they fall short in practice. But DeepSeek-V3.2 is different, and the technical approach is worth understanding, hype aside. Quick summa...

entry.title: Inference Serving Frameworks
entry.summary: As AI models become increasingly complex and are deployed across a wide range of environments—from cloud data centers to edge devices—the need for robust inference serving frameworks becomes crucial. These frameworks handle the packaging, deployment, scaling, and execution of trained models in production, providing low-latency, high-throughput, and hardware-efficient inference. In this blog po...

entry.title: CUDA and cuDNN: Powering the Engine of Deep Learning

link.title: CUDA and cuDNN: Powering the Engine of Deep Learning

entry.summary: When training deep learning models, especially on large datasets or with complex architectures, speed and scalability become critical. This is where two technologies from NVIDIA shine behind the scenes: CUDA and cuDNN. These foundational technologies have revolutionized how we train, optimize, and deploy deep learning models on GPUs. In this blog, we dive deep into what CUDA and cuDNN are, how ...
